body:
<!--StartFragment-->

Clifton Engineering deliver high-quality respiratory engineering solutions, safety systems, and compliance services to clients across the industrial, medical, and commercial sectors, specialising in advanced respirator technology, breathing apparatus systems, and workplace respiratory protection.

<!--StartFragment-->

#### H﻿ealth and Safety

<!--StartFragment-->

At Clifton Engineering, we recognise the paramount importance of health and safety throughout every aspect of our engineering operations.

We are committed to safeguarding the wellbeing of our employees, clients, and the wider community by maintaining rigorous safety standards and providing ongoing training to ensure our team possesses the highest level of technical expertise and operational competence.

Our objective is to create a safe and healthy working environment for both our workforce and clients while continuously striving to achieve our ZERO HARM objective.

In addition, we are proud to maintain industry-recognised safety and compliance standards across all areas of our operations.

![](/public/images/safetcontractor-banner.jpg)

<!--EndFragment-->

#### Our Employees

Our employees are our greatest asset. We treat every member of our team with respect and provide a safe, supportive, and progressive working environment. We also invest heavily in ongoing training and professional development to ensure our engineers and technicians remain up-to-date with the latest advancements in respiratory protection systems, safety regulations, and engineering best practices.

#### Customer Satisfaction 

<!--StartFragment-->

Customer satisfaction remains our highest priority at all times. We work closely with our clients to fully understand their operational requirements, developing tailored respiratory engineering solutions designed to meet their exact specifications and compliance needs. In addition, we provide ongoing support, maintenance, testing, and certification services to ensure all respiratory systems continue to operate safely, reliably, and efficiently.

<!--EndFragment-->
title: About Clifton Engineering
